algorithm.hash: SHA-256 over the UTF-8 bytes of the input; take bytes [0..8) as a big-endian unsigned 64-bit integer
algorithm.in_rollout: bucket < rollout_percentage (strict less-than, rollout_percentage is an integer 0..100)
algorithm.variant_pick: walk variants in order accumulating rollout_percentage; pick the first where point < cumulative

rollout.hash_input: 日本語フラグ:中文用户
日本語フラグ:id with spaces
